t: Jacob called all his sons and said to them, "Come to me, all of you, so that I can tell you what will happen to you, and also what will happen to each one of you at the end of time."

All Israel's sons gathered round him, from the youngest to the eldest of them. Jacob Israel answered and said to his sons: "Listen, sons of Jacob, listen to Israel your father, from Reuben my first-born unto Benjamin."
He told his sons what would
